Digits may not repeat in the same row, column, or box of the 6x6 grid. Digits in cages do not repeat. Cages all sum to the same total. All the question marks are different digits from 1 to 6 and act as a full rank clue and a x-sums clue at the same time: Full rank: considering all rows and columns as 6-digit numbers read from the direction of the clue and ranked from lowest (1) to highest (24), the question mark represents where in the ranking that row/column lies. X-Sums: the question marks give the sum of the first X digits in their respective row or column, where X is the digit nearest the clue.'},{ce:[[0,0],[0,1],[0,2]],v:''},{ce:[[0,3],[0,4],[0,5]],v:''},{ce:[[1,0],[1,1],[2,0],[3,0]],v:''},{ce:[[3,2],[3,3],[4,2],[4,3]],v:''},{ce:[[5,1],[5,2],[5,3]],v:''},{ce:[[3,1],[4,0],[4,1],[5,0]],v:''},{ce:[[1,2],[2,2],[2,3],[2,4]],v:''},{ce:[[2,5],[3,4],[3,5],[4,4],[5,4]],v:''},{v:'solution: 842365301274765081410538628107537426'}],o:[{ct:[-0.5,2.5],w:0.25,h:0.25,c1:#F,c2:#F,r:f,fs:16,te:'?'},{ct:[-0.5,3.5],w:0.25,h:0.25,c1:#F,c2:#F,r:f,fs:16,te:'?'},{ct:[2.5,6.5],w:0.25,h:0.25,c1:#F,c2:#F,r:f,fs:16,te:'?'},{ct:[1.5,-0.5],w:0.25,h:0.25,c1:#F,c2:#F,r:f,fs:16,te:'?'},{ct:[6.5,1.5],w:0.25,h:0.25,c1:#F,c2:#F,r:f,fs:16,te:'?'},{ct:[6.5,4.5],w:0.25,h:0.25,c1:#F,c2:#F,r:f,fs:16,te:'?'}],vd:[{id:'rvj3DAIAe88',publishedAt:'2023-09-30T22:00:21Z',t:'The Impossible Sudoku Project',d:2004}]}
